sections.paragraph: m. a field, plain (comp. Hos 12:13, where it is expressed by the word שָׂדֶה) from the root פָּדַד No. 2. Hence פַּדַּן־אֲרָם the plain, or plain region of Syria [Padan-Aram], i.e. Mesopotamia, with the desert to the west of the Euphrates, opp. to the mountainous region by the Mediterranean Sea, Gen 31:18 28:2 , seqq.; simply פַּדָּן Gen 48:7. With ה local פַּדֶּנָה אֲרָם Gen 28:2, Gen 28:5, Gen 28:6.
